ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Unique referral code for the user */,
  "referred_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who referred this user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the interaction */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the interaction (e.g., ads_facebook, seo_google) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the interaction (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "operative_system" TEXT /* Operative system used for the interaction (e.g., iOS, android) */,
  "test" INTEGER /* Test completion status (0 for incomplete, 1 for complete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the interaction */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the interaction */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, view, add to cart) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page where the interaction occurred */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral (e.g., direct, organic, social) */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the marketing campaign (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction that led to the conversion */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product or service purchased */,
  "converted" INTEGER /* Conversion status (0 for incomplete, 1 for complete) */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., purchase, signup, lead) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product or service purchased */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied during the conversion */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount applied during the conversion */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost (if applicable) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code used during the conversion (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the user's location */,
  "long" REAL /* Longitude of the user's location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state of the user's location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the user's location */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., iPhone, Samsung Galaxy) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., mobile, web) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the device (e.g., iPhone 12, Galaxy S21) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the device (e.g., Apple, Samsung) */,
  "screen_size" REAL /* Screen size of the device in inches */,
  "screen_resolution" TEXT /* Screen resolution of the device (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "device_token" TEXT /* Unique token for push notifications (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operative_systems" (
  "os_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operative system */,
  "os_name" TEXT /* Name of the operative system (e.g., iOS, android) */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operative system */,
  "os_family" TEXT /* Family of the operative system (e.g., iOS, Android, Windows) */,
  "os_release" TEXT /* Release date of the operative system version */,
  "os_security_patch_level" TEXT /* Security patch level of the operative system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Facebook Ads, Google SEO) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., social media, search engine) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source (e.g., ad link, SEO keyword) */,
  "source_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters passed with the source URL (e.g., campaign ID, ad group) */,
  "source_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the source (e.g., facebook.com, google.com) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., A/B test, multivariate test) */,
  "test_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the test */,
  "test_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the test */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., active, completed, paused) */,
  "test_results_url" TEXT /* URL where test results can be viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product or service */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product or service */,
  "price_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the price */,
  "price_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the price */,
  "price_status" TEXT /* Status of the price (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the product (e.g., 'electronics', 'sale') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_devices" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device used for the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction with the device in seconds */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction with the device (e.g., click, view) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_operative_systems" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "os_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operative system used for the interaction */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Version of the operative system used during the interaction */,
  "os_security_patch_level" TEXT /* Security patch level of the operative system used during the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "os_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_sources" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the interaction */,
  "source_parameters" TEXT /* Additional parameters passed with the source URL during the interaction */,
  "source_domain" TEXT /* Domain of the source used during the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_tests" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test completed during the interaction */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test during the interaction (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "test_results_url" TEXT /* URL where test results can be viewed during the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id", "test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_locations" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the location data was last updated */,
  "accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of the geolocation data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "location_id")
)
